changelog:
### 🎯 Ipon Savings Challenge & Cashflow Runway Enhancements
- **Scrollable Cashflow Graph & Increased Height** — Expanded the cashflow chart height to a generous 320px inside a scrollable screen layout for optimal chart interaction and visibility.
- **Dual Line Runway Graph** — Visualized both **With Ipon Challenge / Sandbox** projected runway and **Standard Cashflow (Baseline)** on the same chart with interactive legend indicators.
- **Touch Date & Day Tooltips** — Holding down anywhere on the graph now displays the exact calendar date (`e.g. Jul 21, 2026 • Day 15`) along with projected balances for both lines.
- **Dynamic Sandbox Default Target** — Creating an Ipon Challenge now automatically defaults starting daily savings rate from the current Sandbox Simulator value.
- **Full Text Legibility & Tooltips** — Eliminated title truncation (`...`) across graph titles and challenge cards with tooltips and flexible wrapping.
- **Interactive Calendar Checklist Grid** — Set up daily savings challenges (e.g. ₱20/day, ₱50/day, or progressive savings) for durations up to 1 year (365 days) or custom durations with visual status indicators for Checked, Today (NOW accent glow), Missed (warning indicator), and Upcoming days.
- **Advance Ipon (Fast-Forward Savings)** — 1-tap bulk check-in feature allowing users to check off multiple upcoming days at once when depositing money in advance.
- **Reset Monitoring Checkmarks** — Clear all daily checkmarks back to Day 0 while preserving challenge settings and past wallet ledger entries, making it easy to restart daily tracking if saved funds were spent.
- **Optional Auto-Deposit to Asset Pots** — Toggle automatic inflow transaction creation and pot balance updates (e.g. GCash - Personal Pot) directly upon checking off challenge days.
